001.name: Pangreed
001.description: A timid creature that keeps its claws pressed together, as if nervously asking for something. Pangreed forms strong emotional bonds and is fiercely loyal once attached.

002.name: Kleptolin
002.description: Kleptolin waddles awkwardly with an ever - present grin, hoarding trinkets and oddities in towering piles. Despite its clumsiness, it always finds something worth keeping.

003.name: Kleptadel
003.description: A towering vault of cunning and greed, Kleptadel hoards treasures behind impenetrable defenses. Every glint of gold fuels its obsession, and its sharp mind ensures nothing of value ever escapes its grasp.

004.name: Nimphie
004.description: A playful river - dweller, Nimphie flutters its ears in an attempt to charm larger creatures. Though small, it carries the mischievous spark of something greater within.

005.name: Molph
005.description: Molph clumsily drags its discarded molted skin, wielding it like a makeshift weapon. Though awkward and slow, its determination to adapt never wavers.

006.name: Archimolt
006.description: Mastering the art of aerial agility, Archimolt bends its body mid - flight to release precise blasts of pure energy. Its elegance hides a sharp tactical mind.

007.name: Larvaark
007.description: A tiny worm - like creature armored in wooden plates, Larvaark hides in plain sight. The length of its growing horn signals the approach of its inevitable transformation.

008.name: Pupaark
008.description: Encased in wooden armor, Pupaark’s body prepares for the changes ahead. Its horned shell gleams with anticipation as it awaits its next evolution.

009.name: Scarabark
009.description: With wings hidden beneath bark - like plating, Scarabark strikes from the shadows of trees. Swift and silent, it is both predator and master of camouflage.

010.name: Kappybara
010.description: Good - natured and trusting, Kappybara wanders through forests making friends with every creature it meets, often to its own peril.

011.name: Fabbybara
011.description: Sporting a luxurious golden coat, Fabbybara struts with regal pride. Its lofty airs mask a rather dim intellect, but its charm remains undeniable.

012.name: Camoutee
012.description: A master of stillness, Camoutee’s rocky hide is often mistaken for part of the landscape. Yet beneath its earthen shell, something darker seems to lie in wait.

013.name: Trollodyte
013.description: A clumsy prankster that hides among fungi, Trollodyte rarely scares anyone, but it never stops trying. Its persistence is oddly endearing.

014.name: Neandroll
014.description: A mischievous Memory that lives to startle and confuse. Its pranks grow bolder with age, and those that learn to harness astral energy become surprisingly dangerous beneath their goofball charm.

015.name: Nortle
015.description: Slow and deliberate, Nortle bears an ancient shell said to map the lands it has wandered. Still, its eyes often drift skyward, as though it yearns for some distant freedom.

016.name: Kitlem
016.description: A clay - bodied relic believed to be crafted by an ancient civilization. Its hollow eyes suggest a forgotten purpose still lingers deep within.

017.name: Leolem
017.description: A silent guardian that stands motionless beneath desert suns, awaiting a call that may never come. Some say it is still bound by ancient vows.

018.name: Obelion
018.description: A monolithic sentinel of living stone. If the sacred seal on its back is ever shattered, only an empty husk remains, its spirit lost to time.

019.name: Saolapod
019.description: Its delicate jaws open like a blooming flower, but beneath the gentle exterior lies a hunger for anything it can swallow whole.

020.name: Saolosaur
020.description: Its twin heads fight for control, their constant bickering often letting prey escape. When they act in unison, however, few can withstand their assault.

021.name: Gargeko
021.description: A shy, statuesque creature that prefers to remain perfectly still. If spotted moving, it covers its face in embarrassment.

022.name: Jadine
022.description: Bathed in the glow of Aether - rich lands, Jadine weaves soft, luminous vines that shift in brightness at will, guiding the lost or warding off unseen dangers.

023.name: Gekoal
023.description: With gentle flames and a calming croak, Gekoal brings warmth to those around it. When gathered in groups, their synchronized glow creates a soothing symphony of light and sound.

024.name: Firog
024.description: Firog spends its days in quiet meditation, its body aglow with gentle embers. It speaks little but commands respect through its serene and disciplined presence.

025.name: Ignicroak
025.description: A guardian by nature, Ignicroak is considered a protector among Memories. The heat from its fiery wings can be felt from a great distance.

026.name: Tygrin
026.description: With its unnerving permanent smile, Tygrin charms its way into the trust of others - only to strike when least expected. Beneath its playful exterior lies a cunning predator always sizing up the next meal.

027.name: Tyrosene
027.description: Tyrosene hides its true nature behind a crooked, toothy grin. Cloaked in shadows, it slips into the dreams of its prey, feeding on hidden fears without leaving a trace.

028.name: Chickarus
028.description: A fiery - hearted fledgling that dreams of reaching the sun. No matter the danger, it soars ever higher, chasing distant warmth.

029.name: Daedrake
029.description: Grounded by the scars of ambition, this flightless Memory wanders the land, as if fated to warn others against chasing unreachable heights.

030.name: Torchupa
030.description: A gentle, playful creature that roams near forgotten ruins. When it finds others of its kind, they leap together into the unknown - symbols of trust, freedom, and rebirth.

031.name: Vulcabra
031.description: Born from the union of many Torchupa, it ignites an ancient flame, becoming a living symbol of balance and renewal. Its fiery heart carries the echo of countless lives that came before.

032.name: Pytares
032.description: A ruthless hunter that wields its molten tail like a fiery needle. One sting delivers excruciating burns that few recover from.

033.name: Infernix
033.description: A radiant, untamed spirit that blazes across the skies in arcs of living flame. Ancient myths speak of it as the embodiment of freedom, wild and uncatchable.

034.name: Embryx
034.description: Embryx burns with ancient fire, its core alive with restless heat. When provoked, it erupts in blinding fury, leaving only ash in its wake.

035.name: Nerindra
035.description: A restless spirit of transformation, Nerindra erupts with thunderous brilliance. Its bursts mark both destruction and the spark of new creation.

036.name: Macalm
036.description: This cheerful, plump bird radiates pure kindness. Believed to bring good fortune, Macalm is often kept as a beloved companion by the people of this land.

037.name: Parrograce
037.description: With flowing ribbons that catch the wind, Parrograce drifts gracefully through the sky. When sunlight touches its feathers, it creates shimmering rainbow displays. It trusts others easily, wearing its heart on its wings.

038.name: Dovine
038.description: In moments of great need, Dovine glides down in radiant silence, its feathers shimmering with ethereal light. Moved by compassion, it offers aid without expectation, embodying pure grace in every motion.

039.name: Privatary
039.description: Privatary thrives in disciplined flocks where order rules. Those who defy their strict code find themselves cast out, left to wander the skies alone.

040.name: Marshawk
040.description: A tireless leader, Marshawk greets the dawn with a song that rallies its kin. It patrols the skies with unwavering focus, commanding respect among its flock.

041.name: Leuteagle
041.description: With wings forged into mighty fists, Leuteagle enforces order with brute force. It brooks no defiance and swiftly crushes any who challenge its command.

042.name: Crowshank
042.description: Sharp - beaked and swift, Crowshank hones its attacks by sharpening its bill against stone. It strikes with precision, always ready to pierce through obstacles.

043.name: Dodaxe
043.description: With a beak honed to razor sharpness, Dodaxe is a fearsome cutter of trees and foes alike. When idle, it seeks out Larvaark for playful but dangerous duels.

044.name: Skyttle
044.description: Freed from earthly weight, Skyttle glides effortlessly, carrying the dreams of the flightless. Legends say it guides lost travelers home.

045.name: Machtern
045.description: Built for pure speed, this razor - sharp bird can break the sound barrier mid - flight. Its feathers strike with deadly precision.

046.name: Machstream
046.description: The fastest aerial species known in Alterra. Having shed its legs through evolution, it never touches the ground, because to land is to die.

047.name: Eaglick
047.description: Awkward and ill - tempered, Eaglick is often dismissed as weak for its clumsy body and ragged wings. But hardship only tempers it, and those who mock it rarely survive what it becomes.

048.name: Cyndrell
048.description: Born from wildfire and ash, this Memory leaves smoldering trails in its wake. It thrives in the cycle of destruction and renewal.

049.name: Mallstard
049.description: A gluttonous and self - centered Memory that demands constant offerings. It will beg, pout, and even steal rather than fend for itself.

050.name: Mallgard
050.description: A kind - hearted soul who spends its days gathering food to feed the hungry - including the undeserving Mallstard it calls kin.

051.name: Bastross
051.description: A shameless thief with no moral compass. It lies in wait for the perfect chance to swipe food - or anything shiny - without remorse.

052.name: Dawnstross
052.description: A reformed scavenger who now dedicates itself to helping others. It tries - often in vain - to teach better ways to its mischievous counterpart.

053.name: Gleeraffe
053.description: A long - necked swimmer that creates mesmerizing whirlpools with a flick of its body. Though built for land, it prefers the freedom of the water.

054.name: Tyraph
054.description: With horn - like nostrils and a love of the deep, Tyraph exhales with force to create mighty typhoons, defending its watery domain.

055.name: Vuzoo
055.description: A relentlessly noisy Memory that toots out ear - piercing blasts from sunrise to sunset. It has no idea how unbearable it sounds - and no intention of stopping.

056.name: Tubone
056.description: Still awkward and loud, Tubone honks and blares with dramatic flair. Its clumsy performances drive most creatures away, though it seems oblivious to their distress.

057.name: Sirene
057.description: A haunting master of sound whose ethereal songs lure even the most cautious. Some say it takes secret revenge on those who once mocked its music, pulling them into the depths to listen forever.

058.name: Egwin
058.description: To safely release its excess static, this Memory buries itself in hot sand. It’s careful not to shock nearby companions when fully charged.

059.name: Kinguin
059.description: A stoic, composed Memory that loses control of its electricity when excited. Its zaps have been known to light up entire beaches.

060.name: Ottar
060.description: This clumsy sea otter - like Memory often topples face - first, but always bounces back proudly without missing a beat.

061.name: Drottar
061.description: Its shimmering pelt was once coveted by nobles for ceremonial robes. To escape danger, it can dissolve into liquid, slipping away before anyone realizes it’s gone.

062.name: Cutumber
062.description: A deceptively harmless Memory whose flexible tentacles grant surprising dexterity. Once prized as a delicacy, Cutumber now drifts in quiet waters, far from prying eyes.

063.name: Bersekumber
063.description: In this form, its tentacles lash with blinding speed. Though it appears fragile, Bersekumber defends itself with corrosive strikes when provoked.

064.name: Tapuana
064.description: A gentle Memory known for surfacing quietly and giving curious taps to anything nearby. Though harmless, its sudden touch has startled many unsuspecting travelers.

065.name: Grabuana
065.description: Lurking just beneath still waters, Grabuana strikes without warning - grabbing anything that comes too close and dragging it into the depths before vanishing without a sound.

066.name: Caffita
066.description: A gentle Memory that rarely leaves its parent’s side. It is known to perish from grief if separated too long from its family.

067.name: Cowkutta
067.description: Peaceful and nurturing until threatened, this Memory will defend its young with unmatched fury, even at the cost of its own life.

068.name: Misticle
068.description: It manipulates moisture to create dense fog, masking its presence from predators and prey alike. Hunters call it the “phantom in the mist.”

069.name: Parafrost
069.description: Legends claim this ghostly Memory is the spirit of an ancient guardian, returning to avenge the wrongs of a forgotten age.

070.name: Aphrogobi
070.description: Vain beyond measure, Aphrogobi demands constant praise. If slighted, it throws melodramatic tantrums - often involving a slap of its powerful tail.

071.name: Leviadon
071.description: A slumbering giant said to dream the world itself into being. Each breath stirs the seas; each twitch sends storms across the horizon.

072.name: Hydryx
072.description: Hydryx flows with unshakable calm, its liquid form bending but never breaking. Legends say no force on land or sea can overcome its quiet resilience.

073.name: Natindra
073.description: Born of dawnlight and fertile breath, Natindra awakens rivers and forests alike. Wherever it passes, the world renews itself in quiet splendor.

074.name: Bambolt
074.description: A playful yet mysterious creature, Bambolt lives alongside humans. Its soft fur crackles with latent electricity, but few can explain why it bonds so closely to certain caretakers.

075.name: Sinoshock
075.description: The tip of its tail crackles with pure electricity. When hungry, Sinoshock dips it into rivers and lakes, stunning fish with ease.

076.name: Pollit
076.description: A hive - minded Memory that weaves living thought - webs beneath the soil. When threatened, it can unleash a devastating coordinated strike with eerie precision.

077.name: Cerebrawl
077.description: A brilliant but volatile offshoot of Pollit, Cerebrawl directs the thought - web from afar, always vying for dominance against its own kind.

078.name: Sparkodile
078.description: A mischievous biter that loves to snack on electric - type tails to recharge. It’s happiest when well - fed and fully juiced.

079.name: Drakken
079.description: A solitary beast drawn to violent storms. Its mastery of lightning lets it color the sky with dazzling electrical displays.

080.name: Zapumaphoo
080.description: A jittery Memory that builds up electrical energy in the rings of its tail. If it doesn’t release the excess power, it becomes dangerously volatile, zapping everything nearby without warning.

081.name: Voltemur
081.description: Playful by nature, this Memory generates electricity as it frolics with its own kind. When overcharged, it erupts in chaotic sparks that can ignite its surroundings.

082.name: Recnac
082.description: A cruel and calculating predator, Recnac delights in prolonging its battles, savoring every moment of its prey’s suffering.

083.name: Voltyx
083.description: Voltyx surges with wild, untamed energy. A living flash of lightning, it vanishes and strikes before its foes can even react.

084.name: Doju
084.description: A determined underdog who trains endlessly, hauling logs twice its size in pursuit of becoming a warrior. Its sheer determination inspires admiration in even the strongest Memories.

085.name: Kensu
085.description: A graceful and focused fighter whose every movement reflects discipline. With precise, blinding strikes, Kensu can slice through even the thickest obstacles without hesitation.

086.name: Sensu
086.description: A meditative master said to reach a state of perfect stillness atop mountain peaks. In this transcendent form, Sensu can evade any attack as if time itself slows in reverence.

087.name: Hiccori
087.description: A shy creature that hides in plain sight, barely noticed by others. It watches the world with wide, curious eyes, storing secrets no one suspects.

088.name: Diccori
088.description: Cautious but determined, Diccori puffs itself up to appear larger when threatened. Though small, it shows surprising courage - especially when it knows it’s not alone.

089.name: Doccori
089.description: A mischievous yet ancient spirit that blurs the line between reality and illusion. It’s known for making precious things, and sometimes even other creatures, disappear without a trace.

090.name: Voltstrom
090.description: A bringer of desert storms, Voltstrom summons lightning from clear skies. Locked in endless clash with its counterpart, it is seen by desert dwellers as both destroyer and savior.

091.name: Sandstrom
091.description: A harbinger of endless sandstorms, Sandstrom scours the land dry and desolate. Its eternal conflict with Voltstrom shapes the fate of the shifting wastelands.

092.name: Solotl
092.description: A rare embodiment of spiritual energy, Solotl channels flame and lightning, flickering echoes of a soul caught in eternal struggle.

093.name: Megaloth
093.description: This lumbering guardian slumbers beneath ancient blossom trees. Woe to any fool who disturbs its endless sleep.

094.name: Trillobeetle
094.description: Encased in a near - impenetrable shell, it endures attacks until its moment to retaliate. Its patience is legendary.

095.name: Manere
095.description: As it walks, the land blooms behind it. Manere’s aether - charged droppings are said to let plants thrive far beyond their natural span.

096.name: Portoop
096.description: Phasing through solid ground, Portoop leaves behind fertile soil wherever it roams. Trees nourished by its presence are said to outlast even the harshest seasons.

097.name: Fawness
097.description: Graceful and serene, Fawness walks with quiet dignity. Known for its healing touch, it appears briefly to aid the wounded before slipping away like a dream.

098.name: Meridoe
098.description: Meridoe carries a mystical bow capable of both harm and healing. Its arrows respond to the heart of its wielder, healing only those of pure intent.

099.name: Orky
099.description: A gentle oddity that “swims” through land, its dorsal fin breaking the soil’s surface. Playful and harmless, it delights in startling onlookers before vanishing underground.

100.name: Orclaw
100.description: A docile grazer with an insatiable appetite. Orclaw is rarely seen without food and lashes out only when disturbed - protective of its stash and its solitude.

101.name: Orcleave
101.description: A boulder - breaking beast that combines brute strength with surprising smarts. Orcleave lifts, wedges, and shatters obstacles with terrifying precision.

102.name: Yider
102.description: This eerie tarantula weaves webs that shimmer with glimpses of other paths of fate. Its ethereal eye is said to witness more than one moment at once, sometimes even catching its own reflection where it should not be.

103.name: Akrojin
103.description: Playful and restless, Akrojin weaves hypnotic patterns in the sand. Time seems to vanish in its presence without a trace.

104.name: Orbyx
104.description: A primordial lifeform with limitless potential. Though fragile and unassuming, it is said to hold the key to shapes not yet known, if tempered by the proper spirit.

105.name: Aethorn
105.description: A proud and territorial creature whose sharpened aether horn amplifies its psychic strength. When wit fails, raw force prevails.

106.name: Coyal
106.description: Shrouded in midnight shadows, Coyal slithers silently through the dark. When cornered, it calls forth small void squalls to snare its foes and slip away unseen.

107.name: Serpres
107.description: In Serpres, danger knows no direction. Its fangs tear through foes while its spiraled tail radiates void energy that can lash or constrict without warning. To face it is to face peril from every side.

108.name: Voibat
108.description: Swarming in frenzied colonies, Voibat drains the life from its prey with chilling precision. Few survive once caught in its relentless assault.

109.name: Aeter
109.description: Though it could subsist on Aether crystals, Aeter prefers the hunt. It stalks the weak under cover of darkness, driven by instinct and hunger.

110.name: Gordrok
110.description: Void tendrils have fused with its body, allowing Gordrok to reach prey once beyond its grasp. It’s as unsettling as it is patient.

111.name: Manascreech
111.description: Dragging its massive weight with twisted limbs, Manascreech’s guttural wails echo through the night. Its eerie sounds are as terrifying as its appearance.

112.name: Globster
112.description: Never seen alone, this eerie void dweller moves in synchronized packs. When their collective eyes glow, few creatures manage to escape their silent hunt.

113.name: Glurchin
113.description: The dominant mind of a fused Globster swarm. Its jagged limbs are remnants of those it has consumed, each movement precise and deadly. When threatened, it lashes out with blinding speed, its void - warped eyes burning with cold intelligence.

114.name: Kirboom
114.description: An obsessive cleaner that devours every scrap it finds. Once its task is done, it collapses into a deep, satisfied slumber.

115.name: Dyzoom
115.description: Capable of converting hoarded debris into a devastating energy blast. The only drawback? It smells absolutely foul.

116.name: Greaper
116.description: It appears when death draws near, desperately trying to intervene. Though feared, its true nature is that of a silent guardian.

117.name: Grimbyss
117.description: Shrouded in void energy, Grimbyss drifts silently through the shadows. Though it appears monstrous, it only strikes at those standing on death’s doorstep.

118.name: Toibite
118.description: Friendly but clueless, Toibite’s playful nibbles can turn unexpectedly painful - its idea of affection often leaves others limping away.

119.name: Aarthog
119.description: A solitary voidwalker who erases intruders without hesitation. It is a remnant of forgotten depths, and none who cross it remain unscathed.

120.name: Tingtang
120.description: A tiny, sleepy Memory with an overworked mind. It spends its days curled in its pouch, dreaming of puzzles too vast to solve.

121.name: Walawala
121.description: With oversized ears that amplify its psychic gifts, Walawala struggles with hearing but excels at detecting subtle mental shifts in those around it.

122.name: Bingbang
122.description: A playful trickster with small stature but mighty psychic strength. Bingbang fancies itself a villain, but its schemes are more comedic than cruel.

123.name: Psykelp
123.description: A pampered trickster that struts around like royalty. It adores attention and spits water in the faces of those who ignore its antics.

124.name: Psykoral
124.description: A cunning Memory that believes itself ruler of its domain. It uses its psychic powers to command an army of mindless followers.

125.name: Katrypteon
125.description: Some say its skin holds visions of the cosmos, but few dare get close. With a fragile body, it survives by blending into its surroundings until danger passes.

126.name: Psykeelion
126.description: This elusive shapeshifter changes its colors at will, a reflection of its restless spirit and keen intelligence.

127.name: Wooffalo
127.description: Its thick, bark - like skull allows it to deliver devastating headbutts without harming its powerful mind. Slow but steadfast, it protects the sacred groves of its homeland with both brawn and uncanny instinct.

128.name: Bisage
128.description: A wise and ancient Memory, Bisage’s power and musky aroma grow stronger with age. Elders of its kind carry scents said to reflect the wisdom of the wild. It despises those who disrespect the balance of nature.

129.name: Screep
129.description: Its enormous eyes can unearth the most hidden fears. With a single glance, it forces foes to relive the moments they’d rather bury.

130.name: Urstar
130.description: Small but fierce, Urstar roams alone, relying on sheer strength and willpower. It defends its turf without fear, no matter the odds.

131.name: Burstar
131.description: Calm and solitary, Burstar wanders aimlessly until called upon to defend its kind. When battle breaks out, it fights with unmatched ferocity.

132.name: Celestar
132.description: With claws sharp enough to cleave diamond, Celestar fights with primal fury to protect its kin. Its iron will is as legendary as its strength.

133.name: Lupup
133.description: A cunning predator that hunts in packs, Lupup uses teamwork and strategy to outsmart and overwhelm even the strongest foes.

134.name: Lupak
134.description: Battle - hardened and relentless, Lupak delights in testing its strength against both the weak and the mighty. Every fight fuels its savage instincts.

135.name: Fangrir
135.description: A master of the hunt, Fangrir no longer fights for survival but for sheer dominance. Every victory feeds its insatiable hunger to be the best.

136.name: Mezbit
136.description: A gentle soul glimpsed only under moonlight, Mezbit gazes skyward in quiet longing. Its dreamy nature makes it vulnerable to those who would do it harm.

137.name: Lunaria
137.description: Graceful and mysterious, Lunaria dances beneath the moon, vanishing in bursts of blinding light when threatened. Many who glimpse it believe they’ve seen a spirit.

138.name: Komogon
138.description: Legends tell of this reclusive guardian born from the heart of the crystal oasis. With a gaze as ancient as the land itself, Komogon protects the balance of life with unwavering resolve.

139.name: Nulindra
139.description: Cloaked in the silence of the heavens, Nulindra moves between stars unseen. In its shadow all things end, yet from its darkness future light is born.

140.name: Duskink
140.description: Ancient, battered, yet quietly unbreakable. Even when pieces of it fall away, the fire inside endures, smoldering in content defiance.

141.name: Wagmite
141.description: A fragile creature brimming with quiet determination. Though its body strains under the surge of power within, Wagmite clings to the belief that, in time, it will emerge transformed - no matter how long the wait.

142.name: Dranova
142.description: The final embodiment of unstoppable power, Dranova moves with quiet precision, as if every action is preordained. The fire it carries could reduce worlds to ash - yet it destroys only by choice, not by chance.

143.name: Usiah
143.description: The faceless arbiter of souls, Usiah judges without voice, mercy, or bias. It tears the essence from the unworthy, leaving only hollow echoes behind. In its presence, all falsehoods wither, only truth endures.

144.name: Akronia
144.description: Time incarnate, beyond mortal reckoning. She is said to watch many paths at once, her countless eyes reflecting what was, what is, and what may yet be.
